requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 Transport Safety Testing — Mandatory for Lithium Battery Imports to Antigua and Barbuda
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3运输安全测试——安提瓜和巴布达锂电池进口强制要求
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3運輸安全測試——安提瓜和巴布達鋰電池進口強制要求

summary.en: UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) specifies eight mandatory transport safety tests (T1 Altitude Simulation, T2 Thermal Test, T3 Vibration, T4 Shock, T5 External Short Circuit, T6 Impact/Crush, T7 Overcharge, T8 Forced Discharge) for lithium metal and lithium-ion cells and batteries of all sizes, including cells, modules, and battery packs used in stationary BESS. Since January 1, 2020, a UN 38.3 Test Summary is mandatory documentation that must accompany lithium battery shipments under international transport regulations (IATA DGR, IMDG Code, ADR). Antigua and Barbuda is an international maritime trading nation served by St John's Port (the main port of entry for cargo) and participates in international transport conventions; this requirement applies universally to all lithium battery imports by sea or air — there is no Antigua-specific exemption. BESS cells and modules exported from China to Antigua and Barbuda must be covered by a valid UN 38.3 Test Summary from an accredited laboratory before shipment.
summary.zh: UN 38.3（危险货物运输建议书——测试和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）规定了所有尺寸锂金属和锂离子电芯及电池——包括固定式BESS中使用的电芯、模组和电池包——的8项强制运输安全测试（T1高度模拟、T2热测试、T3振动、T4冲击、T5外部短路、T6冲击/挤压、T7过充电、T8强制放电）。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3测试摘要是国际运输法规（IATA DGR、IMDG规则、ADR）下锂电池货物必须随附的强制文件。安提瓜和巴布达是由圣约翰港（主要货物入境港）服务的国际海运贸易国，参与国际运输公约；此要求普遍适用于所有经由海运或航空进口的锂电池——不存在安提瓜专项豁免。从中国出口至安提瓜和巴布达的BESS电芯和模组须在出货前由认可实验室出具有效的UN 38.3测试摘要。
summary.zht: UN 38.3（危險貨物運輸建議書——測試和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）規定了所有尺寸鋰金屬和鋰離子電芯及電池——包括固定式BESS中使用的電芯、模組和電池包——的8項強制運輸安全測試（T1高度模擬、T2熱測試、T3振動、T4衝擊、T5外部短路、T6衝擊/擠壓、T7過充電、T8強制放電）。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3測試摘要是國際運輸法規（IATA DGR、IMDG規則、ADR）下鋰電池貨物必須隨附的強制文件。安提瓜和巴布達是由聖約翰港（主要貨物入境港）服務的國際海運貿易國，參與國際運輸公約；此要求普遍適用於所有經由海運或航空進口的鋰電池——不存在安提瓜專項豁免。從中國出口至安提瓜和巴布達的BESS電芯和模組須在出貨前由認可實驗室出具有效的UN 38.3測試摘要。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (mandatory transport safety tests T1–T8 for all lithium cells and batteries)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) — applies to all air freight of lithium batteries including BESS cells and modules
IMDG Code — applies to all sea freight of lithium batteries including BESS cells and modules (primary mode for China-to-Antigua and Barbuda shipments via St John's Port)
UN Model Regulations, 7th revised edition (2021) — Test Summary requirement in force since January 1, 2020

summary.en: Chinese BESS cell and module manufacturers are required to comply with UN 38.3 for export shipments under international transport conventions. Chinese manufacturers typically hold UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited testing laboratories such as UL, SGS, Bureau Veritas, TÜV, or CAICT. The UN 38.3 Test Summary (required since January 1, 2020) must cover the specific cell or battery type being shipped. A Chinese-origin UN 38.3 test summary from an accredited laboratory is acceptable for Antigua and Barbuda imports via St John's Port. The key gap is ensuring the test summary covers the specific cell model, chemistry, capacity, and configuration of the BESS units being shipped, and that it is maintained current with any cell design changes.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电芯和模组制造商须依据国际运输公约对出口货物遵守UN 38.3。中国制造商通常持有来自CNAS认可测试实验室（如UL、SGS、Bureau Veritas、TÜV或CAICT）的UN 38.3测试报告和测试摘要。自2020年1月1日起要求的UN 38.3测试摘要须涵盖所运输的特定电芯或电池类型。来自认可实验室的中国产地UN 38.3测试摘要可用于经圣约翰港进入安提瓜和巴布达的进口货物。主要差距在于确保测试摘要涵盖所运输BESS单元的特定电芯型号、化学体系、容量和配置，且随电芯设计变更保持最新状态。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電芯和模組製造商須依據國際運輸公約對出口貨物遵守UN 38.3。中國製造商通常持有來自CNAS認可測試實驗室（如UL、SGS、Bureau Veritas、TÜV或CAICT）的UN 38.3測試報告和測試摘要。自2020年1月1日起要求的UN 38.3測試摘要須涵蓋所運輸的特定電芯或電池類型。來自認可實驗室的中國產地UN 38.3測試摘要可用於經聖約翰港進入安提瓜和巴布達的進口貨物。主要差距在於確保測試摘要涵蓋所運輸BESS單元的特定電芯型號、化學體系、容量和配置，且隨電芯設計變更保持最新狀態。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories (CAICT, UL China, SGS China, Bureau Veritas China, TÜV Rheinland China) — acceptable for international transport if the test summary covers the specific cell/battery type being shipped to Antigua and Barbuda

gap.en: The gap is documentation scope and currency, not standard equivalence. UN 38.3 is a universal requirement and Chinese-origin test summaries from accredited laboratories are accepted for Antigua and Barbuda-bound shipments through St John's Port. Exporters should verify: (a) the UN 38.3 test summary covers the specific cell model (including chemistry, capacity, and format) being exported — a summary for a different cell model or capacity is not transferable; (b) the test summary is from a currently accredited laboratory; (c) any cell design change since the original UN 38.3 testing triggers a reassessment; (d) module-level and battery-pack-level assemblies may require separate UN 38.3 assessment; (e) sea freight to Antigua via St John's Port follows IMDG Code requirements — confirm correct UN number, packing group, and shipping name with a dangerous-goods shipping agent experienced in Caribbean OECS island port requirements.
gap.zh: 差距在于文件范围和时效性，而非标准等效性。UN 38.3是普遍要求，来自认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要可用于经圣约翰港运往安提瓜和巴布达的货物。出口商应核实：（a）UN 38.3测试摘要涵盖所出口的特定电芯型号（包括化学体系、容量和规格）——针对不同电芯型号或容量的测试摘要不可转用；（b）测试摘要来自当前仍获认可的实验室；（c）自最初UN 38.3测试以来的任何电芯设计变更触发重新评估；（d）模组和电池包级组件可能需要单独进行UN 38.3评估；（e）经圣约翰港海运至安提瓜须遵守IMDG规则要求——请向熟悉加勒比OECS岛屿港口要求的危险品运输代理确认正确的UN编号、包装类别和运输名称。
gap.zht: 差距在於文件範圍和時效性，而非標準等效性。UN 38.3是普遍要求，來自認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要可用於經聖約翰港運往安提瓜和巴布達的貨物。出口商應核實：（a）UN 38.3測試摘要涵蓋所出口的特定電芯型號（包括化學體系、容量和規格）——針對不同電芯型號或容量的測試摘要不可轉用；（b）測試摘要來自當前仍獲認可的實驗室；（c）自最初UN 38.3測試以來的任何電芯設計變更觸發重新評估；（d）模組和電池包級組件可能需要單獨進行UN 38.3評估；（e）經聖約翰港海運至安提瓜須遵守IMDG規則要求——請向熟悉加勒比OECS島嶼港口要求的危險品運輸代理確認正確的UN編號、包裝類別和運輸名稱。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under international transport law for all lithium battery imports to Antigua and Barbuda by sea (IMDG Code) or air (IATA DGR) — applies universally with no Antigua and Barbuda-specific exemption
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under international transport conventions for all lithium battery export shipments from China

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 transport compliance is universal — a Chinese-origin test summary from an accredited laboratory is accepted for Antigua and Barbuda shipments via St John's Port provided it covers the specific cell model and is current. The primary risks are scope mismatch (wrong cell model or capacity in the summary) or an outdated summary after a cell design change. Verify test summary coverage and currency before each shipment. Engage a dangerous-goods shipping agent experienced with Caribbean OECS island port documentation to confirm IMDG Code packaging, marking, and documentation requirements for BESS cell and module shipments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3运输合规是普遍要求——来自认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要可用于经圣约翰港运往安提瓜和巴布达的货物，前提是涵盖特定电芯型号且保持最新状态。主要风险在于范围不匹配（测试摘要中电芯型号或容量有误）或电芯设计变更后测试摘要过期。请在每次出货前核实测试摘要的覆盖范围和时效性。请聘请熟悉加勒比OECS岛屿港口文件要求的危险品运输代理，确认BESS电芯和模组货物的IMDG规则包装、标识和文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3運輸合規是普遍要求——來自認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要可用於經聖約翰港運往安提瓜和巴布達的貨物，前提是涵蓋特定電芯型號且保持最新狀態。主要風險在於範圍不匹配（測試摘要中電芯型號或容量有誤）或電芯設計變更後測試摘要過期。請在每次出貨前核實測試摘要的覆蓋範圍和時效性。請聘請熟悉加勒比OECS島嶼港口文件要求的危險品運輸代理，確認BESS電芯和模組貨物的IMDG規則包裝、標識和文件要求。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 62281 Storage and Transport Safety — BESS Modules and Battery Packs in Non-Active State for Sea Freight to St John's Port
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62281储运安全——海运至圣约翰港的非活性状态BESS模组和电池包
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62281儲運安全——海運至聖約翰港的非活性狀態BESS模組和電池包

summary.en: IEC 62281:2019 (Safety Requirements for Primary and Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries during Transport) specifies requirements for the safe transport of lithium cells and batteries in a non-active (shipped uncharged or at partial state of charge) condition, complementing UN 38.3 transport safety testing. IEC 62281 requirements include state-of-charge limitations for transport (typically ≤30% SoC for large lithium-ion batteries shipped by sea), short-circuit protection provisions, and packaging requirements. BESS modules and battery packs shipped from China to Antigua and Barbuda by sea freight via St John's Port must comply with IMDG Code provisions (UN 3480 or UN 3481 as applicable), which reference IEC 62281 and UN 38.3 as the underlying safety standards. Sea freight is the dominant transport mode for China-to-Antigua BESS shipments given the geographic distance and the impracticality of air freight for large-format BESS modules.
summary.zh: IEC 62281:2019（运输用一次和二次锂电芯及电池安全要求）规定了非活性状态（以未充电或部分荷电状态运输）锂电芯和电池安全运输要求，对UN 38.3运输安全测试进行补充。IEC 62281要求包括运输荷电状态限制（大型锂离子电池海运通常≤30% SoC）、短路保护规定和包装要求。从中国经圣约翰港海运至安提瓜和巴布达的BESS模组和电池包须符合IMDG规则规定（视情况适用UN 3480或UN 3481），该规则将IEC 62281和UN 38.3作为基础安全标准引用。鉴于地理距离和大型BESS模组空运的不实际性，海运是中国至安提瓜BESS货物的主要运输方式。
summary.zht: IEC 62281:2019（運輸用一次和二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求）規定了非活性狀態（以未充電或部分荷電狀態運輸）鋰電芯和電池安全運輸要求，對UN 38.3運輸安全測試進行補充。IEC 62281要求包括運輸荷電狀態限制（大型鋰離子電池海運通常≤30% SoC）、短路保護規定和包裝要求。從中國經聖約翰港海運至安提瓜和巴布達的BESS模組和電池包須符合IMDG規則規定（視情況適用UN 3480或UN 3481），該規則將IEC 62281和UN 38.3作為基礎安全標準引用。鑑於地理距離和大型BESS模組空運的不實際性，海運是中國至安提瓜BESS貨物的主要運輸方式。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62281:2019 — Safety Requirements for Primary and Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries during Transport (state-of-charge, short-circuit protection, and packaging requirements for transport of non-active BESS cells and modules)

IMDG Code — International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code (sea freight requirements for lithium batteries: UN 3480 for lithium-ion batteries, UN 3481 for lithium-ion batteries contained in or packed with equipment)
UN 38.3 — transport safety testing prerequisite (must be complete before sea freight is permissible)

summary.en: Chinese BESS manufacturers exporting by sea to the Caribbean must comply with IMDG Code requirements, which are internationally uniform. Chinese manufacturers typically manage transport SoC through BMS control or physical disconnection to achieve the ≤30% SoC requirement. Chinese-standard BMS documentation for SoC management during transport should be supplemented with English-language declarations of SoC compliance for Caribbean port and customs review. No China-specific transport standard substitutes for the IMDG Code — international sea freight requirements apply identically regardless of origin country.
summary.zh: 通过海运向加勒比出口的中国BESS制造商须遵守国际统一的IMDG规则要求。中国制造商通常通过BMS控制或物理断开实现≤30% SoC的运输荷电状态要求。用于运输期间SoC管理的中国标准BMS文件，应补充英文版SoC合规声明以供加勒比港口和海关审查。没有任何中国专项运输标准可替代IMDG规则——国际海运要求不论原产国均同等适用。
summary.zht: 通過海運向加勒比出口的中國BESS製造商須遵守國際統一的IMDG規則要求。中國製造商通常通過BMS控制或物理斷開實現≤30% SoC的運輸荷電狀態要求。用於運輸期間SoC管理的中國標準BMS文件，應補充英文版SoC合規聲明以供加勒比港口和海關審查。沒有任何中國專項運輸標準可替代IMDG規則——國際海運要求不論原產國均同等適用。

standards_or_laws: IMDG Code — applies equally to Chinese-origin lithium battery sea freight regardless of domestic Chinese transport standard compliance
IEC 62281:2019 — internationally applicable; Chinese manufacturers shipping to Antigua and Barbuda must comply with same requirements as all other exporters

gap.en: The gap is primarily logistical and documentation-related for the Caribbean shipping route. Key points for China-to-Antigua sea freight: (a) all BESS modules and battery packs must be at ≤30% SoC at time of shipment with documented BMS SoC verification records in English; (b) IMDG Code classification (UN 3480 or UN 3481), packing group, emergency response information (ERI) sheet, and dangerous goods declaration must be provided in English for St John's Port customs and port authority; (c) shipping agent must be experienced with Caribbean OECS small-island port requirements — St John's Port in Antigua has limited dangerous goods handling infrastructure compared to major ports; (d) pre-shipment confirmation of St John's Port dangerous goods acceptance and any port-specific storage restrictions for lithium batteries should be obtained before cargo booking; (e) transit ports on Caribbean shipping routes (e.g. Kingston, Jamaica; Miami, USA) each apply their own DG port regulations — confirm compliance at all transit stops.
gap.zh: 差距主要体现在加勒比航运路线的物流和文件方面。中国至安提瓜海运的主要注意事项：（a）所有BESS模组和电池包在发货时须处于≤30% SoC状态，并附有英文版BMS SoC核实记录；（b）IMDG规则分类（UN 3480或UN 3481）、包装类别、应急响应信息（ERI）表和危险品申报须以英文提供给圣约翰港海关和港务局；（c）运输代理须熟悉加勒比OECS小岛港口要求——与主要港口相比，安提瓜圣约翰港的危险货物处理基础设施有限；（d）货物订舱前应获得圣约翰港危险品接受预确认及任何港口专属锂电池储存限制信息；（e）加勒比航运路线上的中转港（如牙买加金斯顿、美国迈阿密）各自适用其危险货物港口法规——须确认所有中转停靠港的合规性。
gap.zht: 差距主要體現在加勒比航運路線的物流和文件方面。中國至安提瓜海運的主要注意事項：（a）所有BESS模組和電池包在發貨時須處於≤30% SoC狀態，並附有英文版BMS SoC核實記錄；（b）IMDG規則分類（UN 3480或UN 3481）、包裝類別、應急響應信息（ERI）表和危險品申報須以英文提供給聖約翰港海關和港務局；（c）運輸代理須熟悉加勒比OECS小島港口要求——與主要港口相比，安提瓜聖約翰港的危險貨物處理基礎設施有限；（d）貨物訂艙前應獲得聖約翰港危險品接受預確認及任何港口專屬鋰電池儲存限制信息；（e）加勒比航運路線上的中轉港（如牙買加金斯頓、美國邁阿密）各自適用其危險貨物港口法規——須確認所有中轉停靠港的合規性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under IMDG Code for all sea freight of lithium batteries to Antigua and Barbuda; IEC 62281 SoC and packaging requirements apply universally
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under IMDG Code for Chinese-origin sea freight of lithium batteries; international requirements apply equally to all origin countries

source.publisher: International Maritime Organization (IMO) — IMDG Code for dangerous goods sea freight

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62281 and IMDG Code requirements for sea freight of lithium batteries are universal — there is no Antigua and Barbuda-specific exemption. Chinese-origin BESS modules shipped via St John's Port must comply with IMDG Code (UN 3480/3481), carry a valid UN 38.3 Test Summary, and be shipped at ≤30% SoC with English documentation. Engage a dangerous-goods shipping agent experienced with Caribbean OECS island port requirements and confirm St John's Port DG acceptance conditions before cargo booking.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 锂电池海运的IEC 62281和IMDG规则要求具有普遍性——不存在安提瓜和巴布达专项豁免。经圣约翰港运输的中国产地BESS模组须符合IMDG规则（UN 3480/3481），随附有效的UN 38.3测试摘要，并以≤30% SoC状态附英文文件运输。请聘请熟悉加勒比OECS岛屿港口要求的危险品运输代理，并在订舱前确认圣约翰港危险品接受条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 鋰電池海運的IEC 62281和IMDG規則要求具有普遍性——不存在安提瓜和巴布達專項豁免。經聖約翰港運輸的中國產地BESS模組須符合IMDG規則（UN 3480/3481），隨附有效的UN 38.3測試摘要，並以≤30% SoC狀態附英文文件運輸。請聘請熟悉加勒比OECS島嶼港口要求的危險品運輸代理，並在訂艙前確認聖約翰港危險品接受條件。

requirement_topic.en: Antigua and Barbuda Customs Import Requirements and HS Classification for BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达海关进口要求及BESS商品编码分类
requirement_topic.zht: 安提瓜和巴布達海關進口要求及BESS商品編碼分類

summary.en: BESS imported into Antigua and Barbuda as complete systems or as components (cells, modules, PCS inverters, BMS) must be cleared through Antigua and Barbuda Customs. Antigua and Barbuda applies the CARICOM Common External Tariff (CET) framework for import duty classification. Stationary BESS equipment may attract reduced or zero import duty under renewable energy equipment provisions within the CET or any applicable investment incentive regime. HS Code classification for BESS components: lithium-ion cells and modules typically fall under HS 8507.60 (lithium-ion accumulators); PCS inverters under HS 8504.40 (static converters). Customs duty rates and any applicable consumption tax (Antigua's Customs Service levy) on BESS components should be verified with the Antigua and Barbuda Customs Service directly, as renewable energy equipment may qualify for duty concessions under the Antigua and Barbuda Fiscal Incentives Act or investment promotion arrangements. No publicly confirmed BESS-specific duty concession schedule was identified from official sources as of the dataset date.
summary.zh: 作为完整系统或组件（电芯、模组、PCS逆变器、BMS）进口至安提瓜和巴布达的BESS须通过安提瓜和巴布达海关清关。安提瓜和巴布达采用CARICOM共同对外关税（CET）框架进行进口关税分类。固定式BESS设备可能依据CET内可再生能源设备条款或任何适用的投资激励制度享受降低或零进口关税。BESS组件HS编码分类：锂离子电芯和模组通常归入HS 8507.60（锂离子蓄电池）；PCS逆变器归入HS 8504.40（静止变流器）。BESS组件的海关关税税率及任何适用消费税（安提瓜海关服务税费）应直接向安提瓜和巴布达海关核实，因可再生能源设备可能依据《安提瓜和巴布达财政激励法》或投资促进安排获得关税减免。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认针对BESS的专项关税减免时间表。
summary.zht: 作為完整系統或組件（電芯、模組、PCS逆變器、BMS）進口至安提瓜和巴布達的BESS須通過安提瓜和巴布達海關清關。安提瓜和巴布達採用CARICOM共同對外關稅（CET）框架進行進口關稅分類。固定式BESS設備可能依據CET內可再生能源設備條款或任何適用的投資激勵制度享受降低或零進口關稅。BESS組件HS編碼分類：鋰離子電芯和模組通常歸入HS 8507.60（鋰離子蓄電池）；PCS逆變器歸入HS 8504.40（靜止變流器）。BESS組件的海關關稅稅率及任何適用消費稅（安提瓜海關服務稅費）應直接向安提瓜和巴布達海關核實，因可再生能源設備可能依據《安提瓜和巴布達財政激勵法》或投資促進安排獲得關稅減免。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認針對BESS的專項關稅減免時間表。

standards_or_laws: CARICOM Common External Tariff (CET) — import duty framework for Antigua and Barbuda; renewable energy equipment may qualify for reduced or zero duty
Antigua and Barbuda Fiscal Incentives Act — duty concession framework; applicability to BESS equipment should be verified with the Customs Service
Harmonized System (HS) Nomenclature — HS 8507.60 for lithium-ion accumulators (BESS cells/modules); HS 8504.40 for static converters (PCS inverters)
Antigua and Barbuda Customs Service — import clearance and duty assessment authority

summary.en: BESS exported from China is subject to standard Chinese export customs procedures under the HS Nomenclature. Chinese export documentation includes a commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin (Form E for ASEAN countries — not applicable for Antigua and Barbuda), and any applicable export licence or export restrictions. Antigua and Barbuda is not an ASEAN, BRI priority, or FTA partner with China — standard MFN import duties under the CARICOM CET apply without preference. A standard CCPIT or China Chamber of Commerce certificate of origin (Form A for GSP or general non-preferential) may support Antigua customs clearance but does not generate tariff preferences.
summary.zh: 从中国出口的BESS须遵循HS商品名称下的标准中国出口海关程序。中国出口文件包括商业发票、装箱单、提单、原产地证书（东盟国家适用Form E——不适用于安提瓜和巴布达）以及任何适用的出口许可证或出口限制。安提瓜和巴布达非中国的东盟、一带一路优先或自贸协定伙伴——依据CARICOM CET适用标准最惠国进口关税，无优惠待遇。CCPIT或中国商会标准原产地证书（普惠制Form A或一般非优惠证书）可支持安提瓜海关清关，但不产生关税优惠。
summary.zht: 從中國出口的BESS須遵循HS商品名稱下的標準中國出口海關程序。中國出口文件包括商業發票、裝箱單、提單、原產地證書（東盟國家適用Form E——不適用於安提瓜和巴布達）以及任何適用的出口許可證或出口限制。安提瓜和巴布達非中國的東盟、一帶一路優先或自貿協定夥伴——依據CARICOM CET適用標準最惠國進口關稅，無優惠待遇。CCPIT或中國商會標準原產地證書（普惠制Form A或一般非優惠證書）可支持安提瓜海關清關，但不產生關稅優惠。

standards_or_laws: China Customs — standard export documentation: commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin (CCPIT or Chamber of Commerce)
CARICOM CET — applicable MFN import duty rate for Chinese-origin BESS components; no China-Antigua and Barbuda preferential trade agreement in force as of dataset date

gap.en: Gap: There is no China-Antigua and Barbuda preferential trade agreement; BESS components attract MFN duty rates under the CARICOM CET. However, renewable energy equipment duty concessions may be available — verify with the Antigua and Barbuda Customs Service. Practical import steps: (a) confirm HS classification (8507.60 for cells/modules; 8504.40 for PCS; 8543.70 or 8538 for BMS depending on classification) with the Antigua Customs Service before cargo booking; (b) prepare English-language commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, and certificate of origin; (c) include UN 38.3 Test Summary and IMDG dangerous goods documentation as part of the shipping set — port authority and customs may inspect DG documentation at St John's Port; (d) enquire with the Antigua and Barbuda Invest Authority or the Fiscal Incentives division about import duty concessions for BESS used in renewable energy projects before importation.
gap.zh: 差距：中国与安提瓜和巴布达之间不存在优惠贸易协定；BESS组件依据CARICOM CET适用最惠国关税税率。然而，可再生能源设备关税减免可能适用——请向安提瓜和巴布达海关核实。实际进口步骤：（a）在订舱前向安提瓜海关确认HS分类（电芯/模组适用8507.60；PCS适用8504.40；BMS视分类适用8543.70或8538）；（b）准备英文版商业发票、装箱单、提单和原产地证书；（c）将UN 38.3测试摘要和IMDG危险品文件作为随船文件的一部分——圣约翰港港务局和海关可能检查危险品文件；（d）在进口前向安提瓜和巴布达投资局或财政激励部门咨询用于可再生能源项目的BESS的进口关税减免。
gap.zht: 差距：中國與安提瓜和巴布達之間不存在優惠貿易協定；BESS組件依據CARICOM CET適用最惠國關稅稅率。然而，可再生能源設備關稅減免可能適用——請向安提瓜和巴布達海關核實。實際進口步驟：（a）在訂艙前向安提瓜海關確認HS分類（電芯/模組適用8507.60；PCS適用8504.40；BMS視分類適用8543.70或8538）；（b）準備英文版商業發票、裝箱單、提單和原產地證書；（c）將UN 38.3測試摘要和IMDG危險品文件作為隨船文件的一部分——聖約翰港港務局和海關可能檢查危險品文件；（d）在進口前向安提瓜和巴布達投資局或財政激勵部門諮詢用於可再生能源項目的BESS的進口關稅減免。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — all imports to Antigua and Barbuda require Customs Service clearance and duty payment; renewable energy duty concessions may apply — verify with Customs Service before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — standard Chinese export customs declaration and documentation required; no preferential trade arrangement between China and Antigua and Barbuda as of dataset date

source.publisher: CARICOM Secretariat — Common External Tariff (CET) framework for CARICOM member states including Antigua and Barbuda

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese-origin BESS components attract MFN import duties under the CARICOM CET on import to Antigua and Barbuda. Renewable energy equipment duty concessions may be available under the Antigua and Barbuda Fiscal Incentives Act — verify with the Customs Service before shipment. All dangerous goods documentation (UN 38.3 Test Summary, IMDG classification, ERI sheet) must accompany the cargo to St John's Port. Confirm HS classifications and duty rates with the Antigua and Barbuda Customs Service before cargo booking.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国产地BESS组件进口安提瓜和巴布达须依据CARICOM CET缴纳最惠国进口关税。可再生能源设备关税减免可能依据《安提瓜和巴布达财政激励法》适用——请在出货前向海关核实。所有危险品文件（UN 38.3测试摘要、IMDG分类、ERI表）须随货物运至圣约翰港。请在订舱前向安提瓜和巴布达海关确认HS分类和关税税率。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國產地BESS組件進口安提瓜和巴布達須依據CARICOM CET繳納最惠國進口關稅。可再生能源設備關稅減免可能依據《安提瓜和巴布達財政激勵法》適用——請在出貨前向海關核實。所有危險品文件（UN 38.3測試摘要、IMDG分類、ERI表）須隨貨物運至聖約翰港。請在訂艙前向安提瓜和巴布達海關確認HS分類和關稅稅率。
